name: EICRProcedure
title: eICR Procedure
description: This Procedure profile defines constraints on the US Core Procedure profile for the eICR use case.

element.short: Defines constraints on the US Core Procedure profile for the case reporting use case.
Device such as a ventilator as the focus of the procedure
element.definition: A device that is implanted, removed or otherwise manipulated such as a ventilator as a focal portion of the Procedure.
